message:
style: rustfmt formatting cleanup across 9 connectors

Apply consistent rustfmt formatting across airtable, gmail, google-
calendar, linear, s3, youtube, stripe, and anthropic connectors.

Changes are purely cosmetic — function signatures collapsed to single
lines where they fit, import blocks condensed, method chains reflowed,
match arms reformatted, and multi-line let bindings tidied up. No
logic changes in any of these connectors.

Anthropic connector.rs also gets a minor idiomatic improvement:
map().unwrap_or_else() replaced with map_or_else() in the health
check response builder (semantically identical).

Connectors touched: airtable (client, connector, error), gmail
(client, connector, error), google-calendar (client, connector, error,
main), linear (client, connector), s3 (client, connector), youtube
(client, connector), stripe (client, connector, main), anthropic
(connector).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
